products.name: Honey Smacks
products.description: A classic, honey-sweetened puffed wheat cereal that provides a satisfying crunch and a quick, delicious start to any busy morning.
products.scene_setting: A 1990s kitchen breakfast table at golden-hour morning light - an empty white bowl and spoon set out ready for breakfast, a glass jug of milk with no label, a folded napkin, with warm sunlight streaming through blinds.

products.name: Reeses Puffs
products.description: A sweet and crunchy corn cereal made with real peanut butter and cocoa, delivering a deliciously energizing breakfast that kids and teenagers love.
products.scene_setting: A 1990s living room floor in front of a glowing CRT television airing Saturday morning cartoons, low golden light - an empty white bowl and spoon set on a low coffee table, a boombox and a stack of comic books nearby, a backpack leaning against the couch, soft carpet texture in the foreground, background kept softly out of focus with no shelving, cabinetry, or other packaged products visible.

target_audience: Nostalgia-seeking Millennials and Gen Xers (ages 30–45) who grew up on Saturday morning cartoons, collectible toys hidden at the bottom of the cereal box, and race-to-the-bus school mornings. They crave the carefree attitude, bright aesthetics, and unapologetic fun of the 1990s.

campaign_message.body: Grab a spoon and rewind to the sweet stuff. Whether you're reliving the magic of Saturday mornings or just need a blast of pure, sugary joy to start your day, fuel up with the ultimate throwback.
